{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/log/cactus/line.png
|block_health=8
|tool=[[Axe]] or [[Sickle]]
|rotation=log
}}

== Obtaining ==
Cactus blocks can be obtained from cacti, which spawn in deserts and some other hot-dry biomes.

== Usage ==
Cactus can be crafted into 2 [[Cactus Arm|cactus arms]].

Cactus blocks deal 0.5 damage on contact.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Logs]]
